width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) so Scale.FIT FILLS a portrait phone and LETTERBOXES centered on a landscape laptop — one fixed canvas plays on both mobile and desktop. A grid_logic board is camera-FIXED (no scroll): the board is centered in this viewport via the gridMap origin. OWNED BY core/gameConfig.json (the infra groups) — a module MUST mirror core's screenSize, never diverge (template-contract §4).

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width. OWNED BY core (template-contract §4).

debug.description: Enable physics debug rendering (inert for grid_logic — no physics; kept for core parity).

pixelArt.description: Enable pixel-art (nearest-neighbour) rendering. Off by default — grid tiles + numerals read cleaner with smoothing.

boardRows.description: Number of board ROWS (the board DELTA — 4 = classic 2048, 5/6 for a bigger board). The level data's grid.rows mirrors this; the scene reads grid.rows.

boardCols.description: Number of board COLUMNS (the board DELTA). The level data's grid.cols mirrors this.

cellSize.description: Cell edge length in world px (the rendered tile size). The board (cols*cellSize x rows*cellSize) is centered in the viewport via the gridMap origin.

winTarget.description: The win-target tile value (INV-4 — win when any tile reaches this). The merge-slide DELTA: 1024 = a shorter game, 4096 = longer.

spawnTwoWeight.description: Relative probability weight of spawning a 2 on a changed move (INV-3 DELTA; the classic 90% split).

spawnFourWeight.description: Relative probability weight of spawning a 4 on a changed move (INV-3 DELTA; the classic 10% split).

moveLimit.description: Optional max moves for a failModel:'moves' family (0 = unlimited — the default; the win/lose owner ignores it). Parity hook for a move-budget puzzle variant.
